---
title: "Track A: Run all (multi-ROI)"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(here)
  library(quarto)
})

files <- c(
  here::here("analysis", "trackA_multiROI", "01_build_long_qc_multiROI.qmd"),
  here::here("analysis", "trackA_multiROI", "02_lme_coupling_multiROI.qmd"),
  here::here("analysis", "trackA_multiROI", "03_estimand_engine.qmd"),
  here::here("analysis", "trackA_multiROI", "04_fdr_families.qmd"),
  here::here("analysis", "trackA_multiROI", "05_mediation_targeted.qmd")
)

for (f in files) {
  quarto::quarto_render(input = f, quiet = TRUE)
}

message("DONE. See outputs in: ", here::here("outputs", "trackA_multiROI"))
```
